      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee jaw irr tawi Laudis/ 
un tawa eemantojama Teefa/ ko 
tu zaur tawu leelu Spehku/ un 
zaur tawu issteepu Elkenut effi 
isweddiz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
Stahsti no teem diwi afminaireem Galveem:
1. No to Lewitu Atschirſchanaß: 8. Ta 
pirma Bauß la Jsstahſtischana: 12. Jr wee 
na Pamahzischana ka Deewu buhs bihtees 
un tam klaufthe: 16/ 20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Anni Laikâ fazzia tas 
KUNGS us man: Is- 
fehrtees diwi afminai- 
nus Galdinus/ itt ka tohs pir- 
majus/ un kahp pee man us Kal- 
nu/ pehz to buhs tew weenu 
Schkirstu no Kohka taifiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es rakſtischu us teem 
Galdineem tohs Wahrduß/ kas 
us teem pirnajeem bija/ ko tu effi 
talausijs/ tad buhs tew tohs eekſch 
ta Schkirsta likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad darriju es weenu 
Schkirstu no Sittim-Kohka/ un 
iszirtu diwi afminainus Galdi- 
nus/ itt ka tohs pirmajus/ un es 
kahpu us Kalnu/ un tee dtwi 
Galdini bija mannâ Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad rakſtija wiꞥſch us teem 
Galdineem to pirnu Rakſtu/ 
tohs definitß Wahrduß/ ko tas 
KUNGS us jums Kalnâ no 
ugguns Widdus Sapulzescha- 
nas.Deenâ bij runnajs/ un tas 
KUNGS dewe man tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es atgreeſdamneß nofah- 
pu no ta Kalna/ un likku tohs 
Galdinus Schkirstâ/ ko es biju 
darrijs/ ka tee tur buhtn/ ittin 
ka tas KUNGS man irr pa- 
wehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jsraëka Behrni aisgah- 
je no Berot Bnejakana lihds Mo- 
ſeram/ tur nomirre Aârons/ un 
tappe tur aprakts/ un winna 
Dehls Eelefasars tappe par Pree- 
steri winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no turrenes isgahje tee 
lihds Gudgodam/ un no Gud- 
goda lihds Jatbatam weenni up- 
patnu Semini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laikâ afschkihre tas 
KUNGS Lewja Zilti/ ka tee ta 
KUNGA Derribas Schkirstu 
nestu/ ka tee stahiwetu preeſch ta 
KUNGA/ winnam kalpoht/ un 
eekſch winna Wahrdn swehtiht 
lihds schodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht tai Lewja Zilti ne 
kahda Dalliba nedß Jhpaſchums 
irr ar farveem Brahtein/ tas 
KUNGS tas irr winnas Jhpa- 
schums/ ittin ka tas KUNGS 
jubtu Deews us winnu run- 
najs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es stahweju Kalnâ/ 
lihds ka pirmak/ tfchetrdetmits 
Deenas un tfchetrdetmits Nak- 
tie/ un tas KUNGS paklaufija 
mann arridsan to Brihdi/ tas 
KUNGS ne gribbeja tew no- 
maitaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS fazzia 
ja us man: Zellees/ eij to Lau- 
schu Preeſcha/ ka tee nahk/ un 
eeman-
"
    }
